def positive_dotenv_load_dotenv_called_from_multiple_modules():
    rule_id = "dotenv_load_dotenv_called_from_multiple_modules"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "dotenv.load_dotenv() called from more than one module, risking silent config override."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
